title: Deliciously Rich British Stilton Cheese Spotted Dick
description: A rich and energizing British dessert featuring Stilton cheese, this spotted dick is a twist on the traditional suet pudding, made with a mantecare emulsification method to create a silky texture, and is nut-free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the melted butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Crumble the Stilton cheese into the batter and mix until well combined.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove the spotted dick from the oven and let it cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
Transfer the spotted dick to a wire rack to cool completely.
Slice and serve warm or at room temperature.
